EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied by the rule with ID {subject.id}
The rule with ID {subject.id} is triggered on host {event_src.id} during a {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port}
